data.title: Antech™ Launches the Antech Veterinary Futures Scholarship for Aspiring Veterinary Professionals in Partnership with Vet Set Go®
data.description: In Loveland, Colorado, Antech™ and Vet Set Go® have collaborated to introduce a new scholarship aimed at assisting future veterinary professionals by providing financial support and mentorship opportunities.

data.title: Erewhon Selects ReposiTrak's Compliance Management Solution to Strengthen Supplier Oversight and Protect Brand Integrity
data.description: Salt Lake City-based company ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK) has revealed that Erewhon, a well-known California specialty grocery retailer recognized for offering organic and sustainably sourced products, has opted for ReposiTrak’s Compliance Management solution. Erewhon aims to leverage this AI-powered platform to oversee supplier compliance, mitigate operational risks, and maintain the top-tier product and brand standards integral to its customer service. This strategic move demonstrates Erewhon’s dedication to ensuring quality and meeting industry requirements.

data.title: Missouri American Water Celebrates Earth Day with Community Environmental Efforts & Sharing Water Saving Tips
data.description: Tips for Celebrating Earth Day Every Day ST. LOUIS, 04/21/2026 -- Missouri American Water is emphasizing the significance of safeguarding local water sources by promoting environmental responsibility, making strategic infrastructure investments, and engaging with the community.

data.title: Kikoff Appoints Chief Financial Officer and Chief Legal Officer, Deepening Executive Bench Amid Rapid Growth
data.description: In San Francisco, financial technology company Kikoff has named John Kaelle as their new Chief Financial Officer and Robert Mahnke as Chief Legal Officer. This move signifies a strategic decision by the company to strengthen its leadership team. Kaelle will oversee financial operations, bringing his expertise to the table, while Mahnke will be responsible for legal matters. The appointments highlight Kikoff's commitment to growth and success in the industry.

data.title: Vagaro Launches New Yelp Integration to Drive Seamless Booking from Discovery to Appointment
data.description: A popular software platform for beauty, wellness, and fitness businesses, Vagaro, revealed a recent collaboration with Yelp. This joint effort allows consumers to book services straight from Yelp business pages and Yelp Assistant. The integration seeks to streamline the process from discovery to appointment for users. Particularly, iOS users can now conveniently schedule appointments through Vagaro directly from Yelp Assistant, the platform's AI feature.

data.title: AAR launches Airvoyant℠, an AI-driven procurement platform for airlines and MROs
data.description: A leading aviation services provider, AAR CORP (NYSE: AIR), based in Wood Dale, Illinois, unveiled Airvoyant on April 21, 2026. This innovative aviation procurement solution, fueled by artificial intelligence (AI), facilitates direct connections between buyers and suppliers. AAR CORP serves commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs.

data.title: NIQ and Stirista Announce Collaboration to Advance Privacy-Safe Audience Solutions
data.description: In Chicago, a notable partnership was revealed involving NIQ (NYSE: NIQ), a prominent consumer intelligence firm, and Stirista, a company specializing in identity-based marketing solutions. The collaboration aims to create innovative audience solutions, media planning techniques, and activation strategies for advertisers and brands. By joining forces, NIQ and Stirista plan to strengthen their capacity in crafting detailed audience profiles, refining campaign strategies, and boosting marketing effectiveness across various platforms.

data.title: Magnachip Launches 8th-generation Ultra Low-Rss(on) 12V BatteryFET Designed for Smartphone Battery Power Efficiency
data.description: In South Korea, Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation (NYSE: MX) has introduced two new 8th-generation Ultra Low-Ron 12V low-voltage MOSFETs tailored for high-performance smartphone battery protection circuits. These MOSFETs are specifically geared towards the latest smartphones that emphasize ultra-fast charging and energy efficiency. By expanding its product range with these new offerings, Magnachip aims to enhance its competitiveness in the market.

data.title: HEINZ Turns the 57th Pick Into “Mr. 57” at This Year’s NFL Draft
data.description: In Pittsburgh and Chicago, for this NFL Draft, HEINZ is introducing a new tradition by highlighting its iconic number, 57. The "57" has been featured on HEINZ bottles for over 157 years. To commemorate this, they are making the 57th draft pick a special moment called "Mr. 57." This initiative aims to celebrate the player selected at this particular spot during the draft.
IRAN HAS PREPARED NEW SURPRISES FOR THE POTENTIAL RESTART OF WAR – TASNIM ON X

data.title: Bitcoin may face resistance at $78K and $83K, warns Schwab Research, cautioning investors of potential rally caps.
data.description: The Schwab Center for Financial Research issued a cautionary statement regarding the current state of Bitcoin. They highlighted a significant obstacle in the form of key resistance levels ranging between $78,000 and $83,000, representing investor cost basis levels.

data.title: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Reports Positive Nine-Month Tissue Health and Symptom Data from the Highest Dose Cohort in its Ongoing Phase 1b/2a RESOLVE Trial in Eosinophilic Esophagitis
data.description: Today, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Inc. released an update on their clinical trial progress. The company, listed on NASDAQ as EPRX and on TSX as EPRX, specializes in utilizing its unique Diffusphere™ technology for precise drug delivery in areas with high medical demands. The latest report covers findings from the 36-week mark of the Phase 1b/2a segment of the RESOLVE trial focused on assessing the effectiveness of EP-104GI in treating eosinophilic esophagitis (EoE). The data presented pertains specifically to patients receiving the highest dosage with regards to tissue health and symptomatic improvements.

data.title: BioAge Reports Positive Phase 1 Data for BGE-102, a Novel Oral NLRP3 Inhibitor, Demonstrating Potential Best-in-Class Reductions in hsCRP
data.description: Newly introduced once-daily doses of 120 mg and 60 mg have shown promising results with at least 85% median reductions in high-sensitivity C-reactive protein (hsCRP) levels in individuals suffering from obesity and heightened initial inflammation.

data.title: PyroGenesis Converts Plasma Gas to Battery-Grade Carbon Black and Hydrogen
data.description: PyroGenesis has successfully converted plasma gas into battery-grade carbon black and hydrogen, a groundbreaking achievement in the industry. This process marks the first time such a conversion has been achieved without the need for secondary hydrocarbon feedstocks and additives. The innovative technique showcases PyroGenesis' commitment to sustainability and efficiency in the production of high-quality materials. This development is poised to revolutionize the manufacturing sector by reducing dependence on traditional carbon sources.

data.title: Highland Copper Strengthens Leadership With Appointment of Trace Arlaud as Copperwood Project Director and Peter Hemstead as Interim CFO
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, 21st April 2026 - Highland Copper Company Inc. (TSXV: HI; OTCQB: HDRSF) has made significant appointments to propel the Copperwood project towards a construction decision. Trace Arlaud is now the Project Director, while Peter Hemstead assumes the role of Interim CFO. These appointments are pivotal in achieving the company's goals for 2026, including engineering milestones, readiness for construction, and securing project financing.

data.title: Rezolute to Present Results from its Phase 3 sunRIZE Study in Congenital Hyperinsulinism at the Pediatric Endocrine Society (PES) Annual Meeting
data.description: The upcoming oral presentation will cover the previously disclosed top-line results, along with updates on both pre-specified and post-hoc data. This presentation serves to elaborate on key findings and provide additional insights into the data.

data.title: Talisker Increases Bralorne Gold Project Diamond Drill Program to 105,000 Metres
data.description: In Toronto on April 21, 2026, Talisker Resources Ltd. revealed an expansion of its diamond drill program, jumping from 30,000 meters to 105,000 meters. The augmented program will involve 83,000 meters devoted to resource conversion drilling at the Mustang, Bralorne West, and Olympus sites, with an additional 22,000 meters allocated for exploration drilling aimed at veins in Congress and Pioneer Deeps areas. Talisker, under the symbols TSX: TSK and OTCQB: TSKFF, expressed enthusiasm about these developments.

data.title: Mobilicom Secures $2.2 Million in New Purchase Orders for U.S. DoW Program of Record with Tier-1 Drone Manufacturer
data.description: Orders for drone production are increasing rapidly from a major U.S. customer, known as Tier-1, with deliveries underway for a Program of Record valued at $249 million. The consistent scale of production is driving the acceleration of orders from the customer.

data.title: XORTX Meets Nasdaq Continued Listing Requirements
data.description: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a pharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for gout and progressive kidney disease, recently announced that it has received a compliance letter from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC’s Listing Qualifications Department. The letter confirms that the company has met Nasdaq Rule 5550(a)(2), which demands a minimum bid price of US$1.00 per share. To regain compliance, XORTX underwent a 1 for 5 reverse split of their common shares on April 6, 2026. Following this action, the shares traded at or above US$1.00 for 10 consecutive days, fulfilling the requirement on April 17, 2026. Subsequently, on April 20, 2026, XORTX received the compliance letter from Nasdaq, resolving the deficiency in the Minimum Bid Requirement.

data.title: Valmont Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Raises Full-Year 2026 EPS Guidance
data.description: Valmont® Industries, Inc. (NYSE: VMI), based in Omaha, Nebraska, recently released its first-quarter financial results for the period ending March 28, 2026. Avner M. Applbaum, the President and Chief Executive Officer, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance. They achieved record first-quarter earnings per share, attributing this success to substantial sales growth and improved margins. Valmont® Industries is renowned globally for its provision of infrastructure support products and solutions, as well as for advancing agricultural productivity.
